mapper.select: SELECT TRIM(v.VALIDATION_ID) AS validationId, v.VALIDATION_DESC AS validationDesc, v.FIELD_EVENT_TEXT AS fieldEventText, TRIM(v.MASK_TEXT) AS maskText, TRIM(v.CHAR_TYPE_TEXT) AS charTypeText, TRIM(v.MAX_VALUE_TEXT) AS maxValueText, TRIM(v.MIN_VALUE_TEXT) AS minValueText, v.SUBMIT_EVENT_TEXT AS submitEventText, v.JAVA_CLASS_NAME AS javaClassName, v.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(v.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId FROM FWK_VALIDATION v WHERE v.VALIDATION_ID = #{validationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_VALIDATION ( VALIDATION_ID, VALIDATION_DESC, FIELD_EVENT_TEXT, MASK_TEXT, CHAR_TYPE_TEXT, MAX_VALUE_TEXT, MIN_VALUE_TEXT, SUBMIT_EVENT_TEXT, JAVA_CLASS_NAME, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{dto.validationId}, #{dto.validationDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.fieldEventText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.maskText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.charTypeText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.maxValueText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.minValueText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.submitEventText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.javaClassName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastUpdateDtime}, #{lastUpdateUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_VALIDATION SET VALIDATION_DESC = #{dto.validationDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FIELD_EVENT_TEXT = #{dto.fieldEventText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MASK_TEXT = #{dto.maskText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHAR_TYPE_TEXT = #{dto.charTypeText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MAX_VALUE_TEXT = #{dto.maxValueText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MIN_VALUE_TEXT = #{dto.minValueText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SUBMIT_EVENT_TEXT = #{dto.submitEventText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JAVA_CLASS_NAME = #{dto.javaClassName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATE_DTIME = #{lastUpdateDtime}, LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{lastUpdateUserId} WHERE VALIDATION_ID = #{validationId}
mapper.sql: TRIM(v.VALIDATION_ID) AS validationId, v.VALIDATION_DESC AS validationDesc, v.FIELD_EVENT_TEXT AS fieldEventText, TRIM(v.MASK_TEXT) AS maskText, TRIM(v.CHAR_TYPE_TEXT) AS charTypeText, TRIM(v.MAX_VALUE_TEXT) AS maxValueText, TRIM(v.MIN_VALUE_TEXT) AS minValueText, v.SUBMIT_EVENT_TEXT AS submitEventText, v.JAVA_CLASS_NAME AS javaClassName, v.LAST_UPDATE_DTIME AS lastUpdateDtime, TRIM(v.LAST_UPDATE_USER_ID) AS lastUpdateUserId
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM FWK_VALIDATION v
ORDER BY
v.VALIDATION_ID v.VALIDATION_DESC v.FIELD_EVENT_TEXT v.MASK_TEXT v.CHAR_TYPE_TEXT v.JAVA_CLASS_NAME v.VALIDATION_ID
ASC DESC ASC
